message:
chore: Remove target_cass_bb/ build artifacts from tracking

Remove alternate target directory (4550 files) from version control.
Build artifacts should never have been committed. The existing target_*/
and target-*/ gitignore patterns prevent re-adding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
